$schema: Agent registry — declares all agents (local and external). Local agents have a matching folder under ../agents/<slug>/

mcpBindings.purpose: Log storage, full-text search, and anomaly aggregation
Real-time log stream ingestion
Retrieve archived log batches

agent.name: Log Agent
agent.description: Mock. Collects, parses, and analyzes application and infrastructure logs. Detects anomalies, correlates events, and surfaces actionable insights from log streams.

tools.name: Log Search
tools.description: Full-text search across log indices

tools.name: Pattern Detection
tools.description: Identify recurring patterns and anomalies in log data

tools.name: Live Tail
tools.description: Stream live log output from a service

mcpBindings.purpose: Distributed trace retrieval and analysis
Metric queries for latency, throughput, and error rates
Correlated log lookups from trace context

agent.name: APM Agent
agent.description: Mock. Monitors application performance metrics — latency, throughput, error rates, and traces. Provides root-cause analysis and performance optimization recommendations.

tools.name: Trace Analysis
tools.description: Analyze distributed traces to find bottlenecks

tools.name: Metric Query
tools.description: Query time-series performance metrics

tools.name: SLA Check
tools.description: Validate service-level agreement compliance

mcpBindings.purpose: Datadog metrics, monitors, and dashboard access

agent.name: Datadog Metrics Agent
agent.description: Mock. External agent provided by Datadog. Queries infrastructure and custom metrics, manages monitors and dashboards.

tools.name: Query Metrics
tools.description: Query Datadog metric time series

mcpBindings.purpose: Create investigation tickets and attach findings

agent.name: Ensemble Agent
agent.description: Mock. Orchestration agent that coordinates multiple observability agents to perform complex multi-step investigations. Combines log, APM, and incident data for holistic root-cause analysis.

tools.name: Investigate
tools.description: Run a multi-agent investigation across logs, traces, and incidents

tools.name: Summarize
tools.description: Produce a unified incident summary from all agent outputs

agent.name: Trace Agent
agent.description: Mock. Coordinates distributed tracing across services. Calls Log Agent for correlated log retrieval and APM Agent for trace analysis and latency profiling.

tools.description: Search distributed traces by service, operation, or duration
tools.name: Trace Search

tools.description: Analyze individual spans for errors, latency, and dependencies
tools.name: Span Analysis

tools.description: Build a dependency map from trace data
tools.name: Service Map

mcpBindings.purpose: ECK-based log retrieval — fetches app logs per pod from Elastic on K8s
K8s cluster introspection — pod status, events, and container logs
Query AKS container logs via Azure Log Analytics
Kusto telemetry queries for K8s pod diagnostics

agent.name: Kubernetes Troubleshooting Agent
agent.description: Imported (https://confluence/spaces/MN/pages/604782079/MSFN-59239+Observability+Kubernetes+Troubleshooting+Agent-HLS). K8s troubleshooting agent with ECK MCP Server. Fetches app logs per service name, queries ES for root cause. HIGH relevance — built ECK MCP Server for log retrieval, reuse candidate for AOC log analytics.

tools.name: Pod Diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose pod failures using logs, events, and resource status

tools.name: Cluster Health
tools.description: Assess overall cluster health and resource pressure

mcpBindings.purpose: Telemetry and metric queries for operational monitoring
Log analysis and operational event search
Operational dashboard queries and visualization
Azure resource discovery and App Insights telemetry
Operational monitoring across Azure resources

agent.name: MS360 Operational Agent
agent.description: Imported (https://confluence/spaces/MN/pages/638131250/MS360+Operational+Agents). ms360ai-observability agent reveals telemetry, logs, metrics. Includes ms360ai-logging, ms360ai-tracing, ms360ai-istio leaf agents. HIGH relevance — operational agent architecture with leaf agents pattern, similar to AOC sub-agent model.

tools.name: Telemetry Reveal
tools.description: Surface and explain telemetry signals from application stack

tools.name: Operational Status
tools.description: Aggregate operational health across services and infrastructure

mcpBindings.purpose: Structured log storage, search, and contextual attribute indexing
Validate structured log schemas in Azure Log Analytics

agent.name: Structured Application Logging Agent
agent.description: Imported (https://confluence/spaces/MN/pages/664240983/MSFN-57640+-+Observability+Structured+Application+logging+with+Contextual+and+Error+attributes). Application-level structured logging with contextual + error attributes for faster RCA in app logs. MEDIUM relevance — enables richer log data for AOC Obs Agent to query, improves log-based RCA quality.

tools.name: Enrich Logs
tools.description: Enrich raw logs with contextual attributes, trace IDs, and error classification

tools.name: Validate Schema
tools.description: Validate log entries against structured logging schema

agent.name: wizAI Troubleshooting Agent
agent.description: Imported (https://confluence/spaces/PSUPROFESSIONALSRV/pages/503428336/wizAI+Agentic+Troubleshooting+framework+for+Software+Development). AI-driven agentic RCA tool for software troubleshooting. Streamlines root cause investigation process. By Devendra Thakare, Alexander Shapiro. HIGH relevance — agentic troubleshooting already used by PSU, potential reuse or integration with AOC.

tools.name: Auto RCA
tools.description: Autonomous root cause analysis with hypothesis generation and validation

tools.name: Evidence Gather
tools.description: Collect and rank evidence from logs, metrics, and tickets

mcpBindings.purpose: Identify unmonitored security interaction points via Sentinel

agent.name: Observable Items Agent
agent.description: Imported (https://confluence/spaces/DrorShlomo/pages/300502264/Portfolio+View+Non+MS360+Observable+Items). Gap analysis tracking application interaction points NOT yet covered by MS360 observability. LOW relevance — may reveal areas where AOC Obs Agent can add value.

tools.name: Gap Scan
tools.description: Scan application topology and identify unmonitored interaction points

tools.name: Coverage Report
tools.description: Generate observability coverage report with recommendations

mcpBindings.purpose: Detect anomalies in Azure-hosted TLG production workloads

agent.name: Production Anomaly Agent
agent.description: ATT Import. Detection of new error messages in production and resolution provider. Owner: Peddi T. Developed by: Peddi & team (Amdocs-ATT Site team). Tool: Cursor/Copilot. Status: In Progress. Uses production stats for TLG applications.

tools.name: Anomaly Detect
tools.description: Detect new and unknown error messages in production logs

tools.name: Resolution Suggest
tools.description: Provide resolution recommendations for detected anomalies

mcpBindings.purpose: Query Cosmos DB for application state during investigation
Log-based evidence gathering from Azure workspaces

agent.name: Investigate Now
agent.description: ATT Import. Assists with issue analysis and determines root cause for LS-OMS. Owner: OMS T1. Developed by: Karan/Mohan Selvakumar (USA). Tool: Cursor. Status: Not Started. Uses non-prod data.

tools.name: Issue Analyze
tools.description: Analyze reported issues by correlating logs, metrics, and ticket history

tools.name: Root Cause Determine
tools.description: Determine root cause from gathered evidence and produce findings report

mcpBindings.purpose: Check Azure Service Bus queues and DLQ for shift events

agent.name: Smart Shift Summary Agent
agent.description: ATT Import. Automatically gathers all incidents, alerts, chats, calls, and key events from entire shift. Generates clean end-of-shift summary for handover. Owner: Victor Orantes. Developed by: Jared Islas / Victor Orantes (Mexico). Tool: Cursor. Status: In Progress. Target: AMOC.

tools.name: Shift Collect
tools.description: Gather all incidents, alerts, chats, calls, and events from a shift window

tools.name: Summary Generate
tools.description: Generate clean, accurate end-of-shift summary ready for handover

mcpBindings.purpose: Scan Outlook inbox for production alert emails

agent.name: FIRST - Alert Fixer
agent.description: ATT Import. Scans Outlook for production alerts and takes automated actions. Owner: Pradip. Developed by: Hiral Vyas, Pradip (India). Tool: Cursor. Status: In Progress. Targets T1/T2 production and non-production environments.

tools.name: Alert Scan
tools.description: Scan Outlook inbox for production alert emails matching known patterns

tools.name: Alert Action
tools.description: Take automated remediation actions on detected production alerts

agent.name: BriteBill Sanity Agent
agent.description: ATT Import. Auto sanity, health checkup, and error handling from logs in BriteBill and FBF. Owner: Viji Ramalingam. Developed by: Harshini Mandava (India). Tool: Cursor. Status: Completed. Targets production operations.

tools.name: Sanity Check
tools.description: Run automated sanity and health checks across BriteBill and FBF services

tools.name: Error Handle
tools.description: Detect and handle errors from BriteBill application logs

mcpBindings.purpose: Query and analyze Elasticsearch log indices for AI-driven RCA
Azure Log Analytics as additional log source for AI-driven RCA

agent.name: Elastic ChatGPT Log Analysis
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/elastic/chatgpt-log-analysis — ChatGPT-powered automated log analysis and root cause analysis over Elasticsearch. Uses LLM to interpret log patterns, detect anomalies, and produce human-readable RCA summaries from raw log data.

tools.name: Log RCA
tools.description: Run AI-driven root cause analysis over Elasticsearch logs

tools.name: Anomaly Explain
tools.description: Explain detected log anomalies in natural language

mcpBindings.purpose: LangChain ReAct agent queries Elasticsearch for log investigation

agent.name: Elasticsearch LangChain Agent
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/onepointconsulting/elasticsearch-agent — LangChain + ChatGPT agent that queries and analyzes Elasticsearch data using the ReAct reasoning pattern. Includes Chainlit UI for interactive log investigation and conversational troubleshooting.

tools.name: ReAct Query
tools.description: Iterative reason-and-act queries against Elasticsearch

tools.name: Interactive Investigate
tools.description: Conversational log investigation via Chainlit UI

mcpBindings.purpose: K8s cluster management via Cursor IDE plugin

agent.name: Kubernetes Cursor Plugin
agent.description: import-web: https://cursor.directory/mcp/kubernetes — Kubernetes MCP plugin for Cursor IDE enabling pod, deployment, and service management directly from the editor. Provides natural-language K8s operations without leaving the development environment.

tools.name: K8s Manage
tools.description: Manage pods, deployments, and services via natural language

tools.name: K8s Status
tools.description: Query cluster status and resource health from Cursor

agent.name: AWS OASIS Operational AI Agent
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-operational-ai-agent — Amazon Bedrock + Strands agent for incident management. Integrates OpenSearch for logs/metrics, anomaly detection, and human-in-the-loop approvals. Full operational AI lifecycle from detection to resolution.

tools.name: Incident Manage
tools.description: AI-driven incident lifecycle management with human-in-loop approval

tools.name: Anomaly Detect
tools.description: Detect anomalies across OpenSearch logs and metrics

mcpBindings.purpose: Azure Monitor for cross-cloud observability correlation

agent.name: AWS Observability Agent (Bedrock)
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/aws-samples/sample-observability-agent-bedrock-agentcore — SRE-focused observability agent built on Bedrock AgentCore. Queries OpenSearch Serverless, Prometheus, and distributed traces to reduce MTTR through automated investigation and correlation.

tools.name: SRE Investigate
tools.description: Automated SRE investigation across logs, metrics, and traces

tools.name: Signal Correlate
tools.description: Correlate signals from OpenSearch, Prometheus, and tracing backends

agent.name: OpsAgent (AI Monitoring)
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/goshops-com/opsagent — AI-powered system monitoring daemon. Collects NetData metrics, performs AI-driven analysis and remediation, supports multiple AI providers, and sends Discord alerts. Self-healing infrastructure monitoring.

tools.name: System Monitor
tools.description: Continuous AI-powered system health monitoring via NetData

tools.name: Auto Remediate
tools.description: AI-driven remediation actions based on detected anomalies

agent.name: Telecom MAS Agent
agent.description: import-web: https://github.com/darshanbmehta/telecom-mas-agent — Conversational AI multi-agent system for telco operations. Handles sentiment analysis, intelligent call routing, balance management, and fraud detection across customer interactions.

tools.name: Call Route
tools.description: Intelligent call routing based on sentiment and intent analysis

tools.name: Fraud Detect
tools.description: Real-time fraud detection across customer interactions

agent.name: Dual-Layer Agent Observability
agent.description: import-web: https://medium.com/@dinesh707/first-class-observability-stack-for-ai-agents-278d0f6eba74 — Architecture reference for telemetry as first-class agent memory. Implements dual-layer pattern with local buffers and centralized collection, optimized for cost and latency.

tools.name: Telemetry Buffer
tools.description: Local telemetry buffering with cost/latency optimization

tools.name: Centralized Collect
tools.description: Aggregate local agent telemetry into centralized observability

mcpBindings.purpose: Elastic APM backend for OTel trace storage and analysis
Distributed trace capture from LangChain via OpenTelemetry

agent.name: Elastic OTel LangChain Tracing
agent.description: import-web: https://www.elastic.co/observability-labs/blog/elastic-opentelemetry-langchain-tracing-langtrace — Observing LangChain apps with Elastic + OpenTelemetry + Langtrace. Auto-captures traces from LLM calls, vector DB operations, and framework internals for full AI pipeline visibility.

tools.name: LLM Trace
tools.description: Auto-capture OpenTelemetry traces from LLM and vector DB calls

tools.name: Pipeline Observe
tools.description: End-to-end observability of LangChain AI pipelines

agent.name: ServiceNow AI (90% L1 Resolution)
agent.description: import-web: https://www.theregister.com/2026/02/26/servicenow_ai_bot_helpdesk_tickets/ — ServiceNow AI agent autonomously resolving 90% of L1 help desk tickets. Handles password resets, access requests, VPN issues, and routine IT tasks without human intervention.

tools.name: Ticket Resolve
tools.description: Autonomously resolve L1 help desk tickets (password, access, VPN)

tools.name: Ticket Triage
tools.description: Classify and route tickets that require human intervention

mcpBindings.purpose: Query Azure Monitor metrics, logs, and resource health for investigation
KQL-based log investigation across Azure workspaces
Azure resource context and Application Insights correlation

agent.name: Azure Copilot Observability Agent
agent.description: Imported-web-azure: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/copilot/observability-agent — Microsoft AI-powered investigation agent (preview). Detects and correlates anomalies from metrics, logs, and observability signals. Full-stack coverage: App Services, VMs, AKS. Generates actionable findings.

tools.name: Anomaly Investigate
tools.description: Detect and correlate anomalies across Azure metrics, logs, and traces

tools.name: Actionable Findings
tools.description: Generate actionable findings with root cause and remediation steps

mcpBindings.purpose: Sentinel threat hunting and incident triage

agent.name: Azure Sentinel Reference Agent
agent.description: Imported-web-azure: https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel — Cloud-native SIEM reference with 4000+ community detection rules, playbooks, hunting queries, and workbooks. Provides security analytics patterns applicable to AOC security observability.

tools.name: Detection Rules
tools.description: Apply community detection rules for security threat identification

tools.name: Hunting Queries
tools.description: Execute KQL-based threat hunting queries across Sentinel data

mcpBindings.purpose: Azure Container Apps resource management

agent.name: Azure Container Apps AI+MCP Playground
agent.description: Imported-web-azure: https://github.com/Azure-Samples/azure-container-apps-ai-mcp — Sample showing MCP protocol usage with Azure OpenAI on Container Apps. Agent hosting pattern for Azure deployments. Reference architecture for deploying MCP-based agents on Azure.

tools.name: Deploy Agent
tools.description: Deploy MCP-based agents on Azure Container Apps

tools.name: MCP Playground
tools.description: Test MCP protocol integration with Azure OpenAI

mcpBindings.purpose: Azure resource discovery for sample MCP integration

agent.name: Azure MCP Samples Hub
agent.description: Imported-web-azure: https://github.com/Azure-Samples/mcp — Microsoft MCP hub with links to C#/Python/TypeScript/Java SDKs. Plug-and-play servers for Azure CLI, K8s, and infrastructure APIs. Reference for building custom Azure MCP integrations.

tools.name: SDK Catalog
tools.description: Browse available Azure MCP SDKs (C#, Python, TypeScript, Java)

tools.name: Sample Discover
tools.description: Discover and retrieve plug-and-play MCP server samples

mcpBindings.purpose: Chapter 1 & 3: Trace topology mapping, broken span identification, and infrastructure health correlation
Chapter 2: Technical isolation — log extraction, stack trace analysis, and error context
Chapter 3: Message flow audit — DLQ inspection and consumer health
Chapter 4: Business data truth — entity state verification and discrepancy detection

agent.name: Default Observer Agent
agent.description: Master SRE agent that resolves tickets via a 4-phase investigation: Trace Topology (APM), Technical Isolation (OpenSearch), Message Flow & System Health (Kafka), and Business Data Truth (Digital Mass). Provides Quick RCA summary and correlated findings.

tools.name: investigate-ticket
tools.description: Run the full 4-phase RCA investigation for a ticket or business entity

tools.name: quick-rca
tools.description: Provide a 2-line Root Cause Analysis summary (Issue, Status, Recommendation)

tools.name: trace-topology
tools.description: Chapter 1: Locate and map the trace topology for a business entity

tools.name: isolate-error
tools.description: Chapter 2: Extract logs and stack traces to identify the smoking gun

tools.name: audit-message-flow
tools.description: Chapter 3: Check DLQ, consumer lag, and infra health at failure time

tools.name: verify-business-state
tools.description: Chapter 4: Query business DB to validate entity final state vs expected

tools.name: correlate-findings
tools.description: Cross-correlate data from all 4 chapters and produce a unified incident report

Supporting data for investigation

agent.name: CES 2.X: Revenue Assurance Agent
agent.description: CES Digital Business Domain agent. Handles: Usage-vs-billing gaps, unbilled CDRs, interconnect discrepancies. Integrates with CES suite MCPs for automated investigation and resolution.

tools.name: Detect Leakage
tools.description: Identify usage-vs-billing gaps and revenue leakage

tools.name: Audit CDRs
tools.description: Audit unbilled CDRs and interconnect records

tools.name: Reconcile Interconnect
tools.description: Reconcile interconnect billing discrepancies with partners

agent.name: Analyze Issue - Agent
agent.description: AI agent that reads incoming fallout tickets - error code, stack trace, order context, affected entity - classifies issue type, root cause category and confidence score. Groups similar DLQ events to reduce redundant classification calls.

tools.name: Classify Issue
tools.description: Classifies fallout ticket by type, root cause and confidence

tools.name: Group DLQ Events
tools.description: Groups similar DLQ events to deduplicate classification

tools.name: Extract Context
tools.description: Extracts error code, stack trace and entity context from ticket

agent.name: Update Order - Agent
agent.description: Applies pre-defined or AI-suggested order field updates to upstream systems (OMS, CRM). Uses M&P-defined action set. Executes only when confidence is above threshold or after human approval. Logs every field change with before/after values for audit.

tools.name: Apply Order Fix
tools.description: Applies field-level update to order in upstream system

tools.name: Audit Change
tools.description: Logs before/after values for every field change

agent.name: Update Configuration - Agent
agent.description: Modifies system or service configuration parameters as part of a known fix - resetting flags, updating provisioning attributes. Runs against controlled change set from M&P. Includes pre-check validation and rollback trigger if post-test fails.

tools.name: Apply Config Change
tools.description: Applies configuration parameter update from controlled change set

tools.name: Validate Pre-Check
tools.description: Validates preconditions before applying configuration change

tools.name: Rollback Config
tools.description: Reverts configuration change if post-test fails

agent.name: Test Order after Handling - Agent
agent.description: After a fix is applied, automatically validates the order state by querying relevant systems. Checks expected field values, status transitions and downstream acknowledgment. Returns pass/fail result - pass closes the ticket, fail triggers escalation or re-run.

tools.name: Validate Order State
tools.description: Checks expected field values and status transitions post-fix

tools.name: Check Downstream
tools.description: Verifies downstream system acknowledgment of the fix

agent.name: Handle Re-run - Agent
agent.description: Triggers re-execution of the failed order or flow from the point of failure using the same input payload. Applies after a configuration or order fix. Monitors execution result and feeds outcome back to the workflow for decision on close or escalate.

tools.name: Trigger Re-run
tools.description: Re-executes failed flow from point of failure with same payload

tools.name: Monitor Execution
tools.description: Monitors re-run execution result and reports outcome

agent.name: Handle Reprocess - Agent
agent.description: Pushes the order or message back into the processing pipeline from the beginning or a specified checkpoint. Used when re-run is not sufficient - e.g. corrupted or needs enrichment before retry. Manages DLQ removal and queue re-injection.

tools.name: Reprocess Message
tools.description: Re-injects message into processing pipeline from checkpoint

tools.name: Manage DLQ
tools.description: Removes message from DLQ and handles queue re-injection

agent.name: Capture Outcome - Agent
agent.description: Logs the full resolution path - classification, actions taken, test result, time to resolve - into the Sky data store. Structured output trains and improves AI classifiers. Flags cases where AI suggestion was overridden by human for model feedback loops.

tools.name: Log Resolution
tools.description: Stores full resolution path with classification, actions and timing

tools.name: Flag Override
tools.description: Flags human overrides of AI suggestions for feedback loops

agent.name: Route to Handler - Agent
agent.description: Based on issue classification and account context, assigns the ticket to the correct queue, team or automated handler. Routing rules combine static logic (account tier, domain) with AI-ranked priority score. Supports fallback to manual queue when no confident auto-route is found.

tools.name: Route Ticket
tools.description: Routes ticket to queue, team or automated handler based on rules + AI priority

tools.name: Fallback Manual
tools.description: Assigns to manual queue when no confident automated route exists

agent.name: Update Entity (Python) - Agent
agent.description: Executes a Python script to update a target entity (order, service, resource) via direct API or DB call. Used for complex or non-standard updates not covered by standard connectors. Script defined in M&P, versioned, executed in sandboxed runtime with I/O validation.

tools.name: Execute Script
tools.description: Runs versioned Python script in sandboxed runtime with I/O validation

tools.name: Validate I/O
tools.description: Validates input parameters and output results of entity update script

agent.name: Om Agent
agent.description: Om Agent
